sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_field Date);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_field) VALUES (1, YYYYMMDDToDate(20230911));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_field = YYYYMMDDToDate(20231122) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_field FROM test_dates WHERE date_field = YYYYMMDDToDate(20230911);
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE date_field < YYYYMMDDToDate(20230101);
